message.content:
@startuml

actor SecurityEngineer
participant EventBus

box "Security Profile Manager" #rosybrown
participant "spm" as spm
end box

box "Software Defined Infrastructure" #darkolivegreen
participant "storageresource" as storageresource
end box

participant "securityprofile" as securityprofile

SecurityEngineer -> spm : Monitor Security Profile
spm -> storageresource : create (name: secProfileMSP, file: ./templates/secprofile.yml)
EventBus <-- storageresource : securityprofile.create
spm -> securityprofile : status (name: secProfileMSP)
EventBus <-- securityprofile : securityprofile.status

@enduml
